creator: rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com
text:
On Mon, 30 May 2011 00:40:18 UT, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of mail/assp,
>
> Please note that PR ports/157414 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/157414

I am attaching an updated patch.  As usual, the upstream developers 
rerolled the file so I've downloaded it and mirrored it on my server.

Thanks!
Rusty Nejdl
